headline: A Look At Cintas (CTAS) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Cintas stock overview after recent performance shift Cintas (CTAS) has attracted attention after a recent period where the share price showed a negative move over the month and past 3 months, prompting investors to reassess how its fundamentals stack up. With a market value of about US$69.99b and annual revenue of US$11.03b, the company sits firmly in large cap territory, which often appeals to investors looking for scale and diversified operations. headline: Citi Lowers Cintas (CTAS) Price Target, Flags Cyclical Risk and Valuation Pressure
summary: Cintas Corporation (NASDAQ:CTAS) is included among the 13 NASDAQ Stocks with Highest Dividends. On March 31, Citi analyst Leo Carrington lowered the firm’s price recommendation on Cintas Corporation (NASDAQ:CTAS) to $160 from $181. It reiterated a Sell rating on the shares. He pointed to continued growth supported by new business wins and cross-selling. At the same […]
